ops.title: cc-notes file-mode authoring: prefilled checkout, attach at apply, edit --attach

ops.text: doc/note add --checkout accepts TITLE + when/tag/anchor flags and writes a prefilled buffer (commit anchors resolved to full SHAs)
doc/note add --apply ingests --attach in the same create transaction; doc/note edit gain --attach/--replace with collision guard
go vet + pure and -tags fuse builds + go test -race -count=1 ./... pass
